title: Realistic - ModPack
description: Realistic Minecraft Create always wanted to play realistic minecraft this your time also with the create mechanics
body:
Realistic Minecraft Create 1.20.1 on Forge 47.4.0 (Latest)

this modpack will add create mechanics allong with create config API, you will also get the realistic look of minecraft like real sun, water and clouds this does not include RTX's raytracing, you can configure bsl Shaders to your system requirements
u can just use this pack in singleplayer but also on a multiplayer server that has the same 

-mods except "Oculus" And "BSL-Shaders" those two u only need to install on the client not on the server!

-Create+
-Create - New Age
-Create - Crafts And Additions
-BSL Shaders
-Config API
-And More...
